Recording.Description: this a test to see if this can find the correct locators / dom elements for reserving a product.
Recording.Name: test of sales order

Node.Description: In the Payment method field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
In the Number field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
In the Customer account field, type a value.
In the Item number field, enter or select a value.
In the list, click the link in the selected row.
